steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu to create an agent using instructions and actions.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" at coordinates (474, 210).
Click on the dropdown option "Tab" under the "Teams Capability" menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select or specify the project directory.
Click the "m365agent.yml" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to open it.

Click the "m365agents.yml" tab in the Visual Studio Code editor to focus on the YAML configuration file within the workspace "VSCSUE_APP_DTtQK". The interaction targets the file tab in the central editor panel, visually highlighted as active with a light underline.
Press **Ctrl+F** to open the find/search bar in the Visual Studio Code editor while viewing the `m365agents.yml` file.
Type the text 'runNpmCommand' into the search input box within the Find widget at the top of the Visual Studio Code window, while the 'm365agents.yml' file is open in the editor.
Click the "deploy:" section header in the m365agents.yml file within Visual Studio Code's editor, specifically to place the cursor for editing or expanding the YAML deployment steps.
@assertion notification \"deploy resources in dev environment\" exist.
